lalibela.title: Lalibela Wonders
lalibela.description: Explore the architectural marvels of the rock-hewn churches of Lalibela, a UNESCO World Heritage site. Walk through sacred tunnels, join a traditional coffee ceremony, and experience the spiritual heart of Ethiopia with a vetted local expert.

1.title: Arrival & The Northwestern Churches
1.body: Airport transfer to your hotel, then visit Bete Medhane Alem and Bete Maryam with your local guide.

2.title: Southeastern Group & St. George
2.body: Explore connecting tunnels, the iconic Bete Giyorgis, and end the day with a traditional coffee ceremony.

3.title: Asheten Maryam & Departure
3.body: Optional morning hike or mule ride to Asheten Maryam, then transfer to the airport.

simien.title: Simien Highlands Expedition
simien.description: Trek the dramatic escarpments of the Simien Mountains National Park. Spot endemic gelada monkeys, camp under highland skies, and follow ridge trails shaped by centuries of wind and stone.

1.title: Addis to Debark
1.body: Scenic drive north, park briefing, and overnight near the trailhead.

2.title: Sankaber to Geech
2.body: Full-day highland trek with gelada encounters and waterfall viewpoints.

3.title: Imet Gogo & Return
3.body: Summit viewpoints at Imet Gogo, then begin the descent toward Debark.

danakil.title: Danakil Desert Star Trek
danakil.description: Journey into one of Earth's most extreme landscapes. Witness sulfur springs at Dallol, camel caravans at Lake Assale, and a night sky untouched by city light.

1.title: Mekelle to Hamedela
1.body: Desert convoy briefing and transfer into the Danakil basin.

2.title: Dallol & Color Fields
2.body: Explore acid ponds, salt formations, and mineral terraces with local Afar guides.

3.title: Lake Assale Sunrise
3.body: Sunrise over the salt flats, camel caravan visit, and return toward Mekelle.

ethioguide.name: EthioGuide Experts
about: With over a decade of experience, EthioGuide Experts specializes in crafting unforgettable, authentic journeys across the diverse landscapes of Ethiopia. From the historical marvels of Lalibela to the breathtaking vistas of the Danakil Depression, our local guides ensure deep cultural immersion and unparalleled safety.

We believe in sustainable tourism that benefits local communities while providing our guests with premium, high-end expedition experiences. Our meticulously planned itineraries balance adventure with comfort, ensuring every trip is a masterpiece of discovery.

simien-horizons.name: Simien Horizons
simien-horizons.tagline: High-altitude treks led by certified mountain guides
about: Simien Horizons is a specialist trekking outfitter born in the highlands of northern Ethiopia. Our certified mountain guides have logged thousands of kilometres across the Simien Mountains National Park, sharing its endemic wildlife and dramatic escarpments with travellers from around the world.
Small groups, strong ethics, and a deep respect for the land define every expedition. We handle permits, scouts, and camp logistics so you can focus on the ridgelines ahead.

danakil-expeditions.name: Danakil Expeditions
danakil-expeditions.tagline: Desert convoys into the lowest place on Earth
about: Danakil Expeditions runs guided convoys into one of the planet's most extreme landscapes. Working hand-in-hand with local Afar communities, we bring travellers safely to the sulfur fields of Dallol, the salt caravans of Lake Assale, and skies untouched by city light.
Safety and local partnership are non-negotiable. Every expedition includes seasoned scouts, reliable 4x4 transport, and a support team that knows the desert intimately.
